name: Bath & Body Works Gingham Fine Fragrance Mist
overview_desc: A fresh blend of blue freesia, white peach, and fresh clementine.

product_page.description: Our sophisticated Fine Fragrance Mist features a refreshing scent that leaves skin feeling great and smelling amazing. Infused with conditioning aloe.
product_page.feature_resolution: Conditioning Aloe, Fine Mist Applicator, Long-Lasting Scent.

name: Bath & Body Works Japanese Cherry Blossom Shower Gel
overview_desc: Nourishing vitamin E and shea butter combine for a rich, bubbly lather.

product_page.description: Wash your way to softer, cleaner skin with a rich, bubbly lather bursting with fragrance. Moisturizing Aloe and Vitamin E combine with skin-loving Shea Butter.
product_page.feature_resolution: Shea Butter, Vitamin E, Moisturizing.

name: Bath & Body Works Warm Vanilla Sugar Body Lotion
overview_desc: 24-hour moisture in a cozy, enveloping vanilla scent.

product_page.description: Infused with Shea Butter and our exclusive Daily Moisture Complex, our enhanced lotion contains more of what skin loves, leaving it feeling incredibly soft.
product_page.feature_resolution: Coconut Oil, Vitamin E, 24-Hour Hydration.

name: Bath & Body Works Eucalyptus Spearmint Hand Cream
overview_desc: Stress-relief aromatherapy for your hands with essential oils.

product_page.description: With moisturizing shea butter and vitamin E, this luxurious hand cream absorbs quickly to leave hands feeling soft, smooth, and nourished.
product_page.feature_resolution: Essential Oils, Fast Absorbing, Aromatherapy.

reviews.comment: Great for dry hands and smells calming.

name: Bath & Body Works Champagne Toast Fragrance Mist
overview_desc: A cheers-worthy spritz of pink champagne and sparkling berries.

product_page.description: Whether you lavishly splash or lightly spritz, you'll fall in love at first mist. Our carefully crafted bottle and sophisticated pump delivers great coverage.
product_page.feature_resolution: Aloe-Conditioning, Fruity Scent, Travel-Safe Bottle.

name: Dettol Original Germ Protection Soap
overview_desc: Classic protection against a wide range of unseen germs.

product_page.description: Trusted Dettol protection with a classic pine fragrance. Cleanses and protects your skin for a hygienic clean and a refreshing feeling every day.
product_page.feature_resolution: 99.9% Germ Protection, Antibacterial, Pine Fragrance.

name: Dettol Skincare Antibacterial Hand Wash
overview_desc: Germ protection with added moisturizers to keep hands soft.

product_page.description: Dettol Skincare hand wash combines Dettol’s trusted germ protection with rose and sakura blossom fragrance and added moisturizers.
product_page.feature_resolution: pH Balanced, Moisturizing, Germ Protection.

name: Dove White Beauty Bar
overview_desc: Contains 1/4 moisturizing cream for soft, smooth skin.

product_page.description: Dove is not a soap. It’s a beauty bar. With 1/4 moisturizing cream, it goes beyond cleansing, nourishing as it washes away the day.
product_page.feature_resolution: 1/4 Moisturizing Cream, Dermatologist Recommended, Mild Cleansers.

reviews.comment: The only thing I use on my face and body.

name: Dove Deep Moisture Body Wash
overview_desc: Instantly soft skin and lasting nourishment after one shower.

product_page.description: Formulated with Moisture Renew Blend, this sulfate-free body wash is gentle to the skin microbiome and provides intense hydration.
product_page.feature_resolution: Sulfate-Free, Microbiome Gentle, Intense Hydration.

name: Lifebuoy Total 10 Germ Protection Soap
overview_desc: Advanced formula for 100% stronger germ protection.

product_page.description: Lifebuoy Total 10 soap contains Activ Silver Formula to fight against infection-causing germs and keep your family protected.
product_page.feature_resolution: Activ Silver Formula, Fast Lather, Antibacterial.

name: Lux Magical Orchid Body Wash
overview_desc: Indulge in a long-lasting fragrance of black orchids and juniper oil.

product_page.description: Crafted by world-class perfumers, this body wash leaves your skin perfumed for up to 24 hours while providing a deep, luxurious cleanse.
product_page.feature_resolution: 24H Fragrance, Essential Oils, Rich Lather.

name: Lux Soft Touch Soap Bar
overview_desc: Infused with Floral Fusion Oil for noticeably soft skin.

product_page.description: Indulge in the delicate fragrance of French Roses. This beauty bar gently cleanses while leaving your skin moisturized and fragrant.
product_page.feature_resolution: French Rose Essence, Silk Essence, Moisturizing.

name: Bath & Body Works Mahogany Teakwood 3-Wick Candle
overview_desc: The scent of a library: rich mahogany, black teakwood, and dark oak.

product_page.description: Made with an exclusive blend of soy-based wax and the highest concentration of essential oils for a room-filling fragrance.
product_page.feature_resolution: 3-Wick Design, Soy Wax Blend, 45 Hour Burn Time.

name: Bath & Body Works A Thousand Wishes Gift Set
overview_desc: A sparkling celebration set including mist, lotion, and shower gel.

product_page.description: Warm your heart a thousand times over with a festive blend of pink prosecco, crystal peonies, and gilded amber. Comes in a decorative gift box.
product_page.feature_resolution: 3-Piece Set, Gift Box Included, Full Sizes.

name: Dettol All-In-One Disinfectant Spray
overview_desc: Kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses on hard and soft surfaces.

product_page.description: An easy-to-use spray for surfaces like door handles, bins, sofas, and mattresses. Leaves a fresh morning dew scent.
product_page.feature_resolution: Multipurpose, Morning Dew Scent, Virus Protection.

name: Dove Cream Beauty Bathing Soap
overview_desc: A classic cleansing formula with a richer, creamier lather.

product_page.description: Formulated specifically for dry skin, this bar helps your skin retain its natural moisture rather than stripping it away like ordinary soap.
product_page.feature_resolution: pH Neutral, 1/4 Cream, Non-Drying.

name: Lifebuoy Mild Care Hand Wash
overview_desc: Gentle protection for sensitive skin with cream notes.

product_page.description: Sensitive skin needs a balance between protection and care. Lifebuoy Mild Care contains the goodness of milk cream and oats.
product_page.feature_resolution: Activ Silver Formula, Milk Cream, 99.9% Germ Protection.

name: Lux Velvet Touch Perfumed Soap
overview_desc: Enriched with almond oil and jasmine for velvety skin.

product_page.description: Indulge in a sensory experience with SilkEssence and the fragrance of Jasmine. Leaves skin noticeably smooth and glowing.
product_page.feature_resolution: Silk Essence, Almond Oil, Jasmine Scent.

name: Bath & Body Works Sunshine Mimosa Travel Set
overview_desc: TSA-friendly sizes of your favorite fragrance routine.

product_page.description: Includes travel-size Shower Gel, Daily Nourishing Body Lotion, and Fine Fragrance Mist. Perfect for carry-ons and gym bags.
product_page.feature_resolution: 3 x 3 fl oz Bottles, TSA Approved, Bright Citrus Scent.

name: Dettol Instant Hand Sanitizer
overview_desc: Rinse-free, non-sticky protection for on-the-go hygiene.

product_page.description: Kills 99.9% of germs instantly without water. Dermatologically tested and enriched with chamomile extracts to be gentle on skin.
product_page.feature_resolution: Alcohol-Based, Chamomile Extract, Pocket Size.

reviews.comment: Doesn't dry out my hands like other brands.
